description: An auditor reviews the administration of the company's real estate leases.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a list of all real estate leases and abstract key data points like rent amount, escalation clauses, and expiration dates.

expected_outcome.value: A master summary of all lease data is created.

nodes.task_description: Select a sample of lease payments and verify they agree with the terms in the lease agreement.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor finds one instance where a rent escalation clause was missed, resulting in an underpayment.

nodes.task_description: Recommend the implementation of a lease administration software to better track critical dates and payment amounts.

expected_outcome.value: A recommendation is made to improve the lease management process.
